title: Uncertainty-driven active sensing (next-best electrode)
expected_band: placing the next electrode where the reconstruction is least certain reaches a target accuracy with fewer electrodes than random or uniform placement; the actively-chosen sites cluster where the field is hard to reconstruct

ladder.classical: random or uniform electrode placement (no acquisition strategy)
ladder.sota: an activation-mapping PINN that exposes an uncertainty but does not act on it
ladder.novel: close the loop: use the posterior uncertainty to choose the next-best electrode, reaching the target accuracy with fewer points (validated as an offline hold-out acquisition study)

engine.model: uncertainty-driven acquisition loop (GP posterior variance) + final Eikonal PINN fit on the chosen sites; ONNX export

references.cite: Sahli Costabal, Yang, Perdikaris, Hurtado, Kuhl (2020). PINNs for Cardiac Activation Mapping. Frontiers in Physics 8:42
references.note: the mapping PINN whose uncertainty drives the acquisition

references.cite: Settles (2009). Active Learning Literature Survey. Univ. Wisconsin-Madison TR1648
